parade 0.12.0

Show run status from the persisted status snapshot

parade_status.Rd

Reads and optionally refreshes the per-run status.json snapshot and prints a compact diagnosis.

Usage

parade_status(
  run_id = NULL,
  d = NULL,
  view = c("summary", "layout"),
  print = TRUE
)

Arguments

run_id

Optional run identifier.

d

Optional parade_deferred handle; if supplied, live counts are refreshed before printing.

view

One of "summary" or "layout".

print

Logical; print the rendered output (default TRUE).

Value

Invisibly returns a list with the rendered lines and current status.

On this page
